texts.Document:Home:Subtitle: Upload files into the document library and monitor the operator paths that turn them into Markdown, metadata, and type-bound fields.
texts.Document:Home:UploadSubtitle: Drop files here or choose them from your device. Each accepted file enters the processing pipeline immediately.
texts.Document:Home:ReadOnlyMessage: You can browse documents, but this account is not allowed to upload new files.
texts.Document:Home:DocumentListHint: Search uploaded documents and inspect their pipeline state.
texts.Document:Home:ReviewQueueHint: Filter the document list down to items that still need operator attention.
texts.Document:Home:CabinetsHint: Manage optional filing targets for new uploads.
texts.Document:Home:ProcessingStep:Upload: The file is stored and queued for processing.
texts.Document:Home:ProcessingStep:Extract: Text extraction, classification, and field extraction run in the background.
texts.Document:Home:ProcessingStep:Review: Documents needing attention are flagged in the list with a Needs review badge.
texts.Document:Home:Statistics:Title: Overview
texts.Document:Home:Statistics:Empty: No documents yet. Upload your first file to see statistics here.
texts.Document:SourceDocumentUnavailable: Source document is no longer available
texts.Document:AreYouSureToDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
texts.Document:PermanentDeleteFailed: Failed to permanently delete the document.
texts.Document:AreYouSureToPermanentlyDelete: This operation cannot be undone. The document, related blobs and ALL derived business records (including any manual corrections made on them) will be permanently removed. Continue?
texts.Document:UnsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please upload a supported image, PDF, CSV/TSV, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, or XLSX file.
texts.Document:FileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 20 MB.
texts.Document:DropOrClick: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select
texts.Document:SupportedFormats: Supported: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, PDF, CSV, TSV, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, XLSX
texts.Document:ProcessingMessage: Document is being processed. Fields will appear automatically once ready.
texts.Document:PreviewNotSupported: This file type can't be previewed inline. Download it to view.
texts.Document:NoSourceFile: This document has no source file.
texts.Document:Rerecognize:Hint: Re-classify using the already-extracted text and refresh fields. The original file is not re-scanned.
texts.Document:Rerecognize:Confirm: Let AI re-classify this document? It re-runs automatic classification on the existing text and re-extracts fields using the latest type and field descriptions. This overwrites the current document type (including any manual confirmation) and any manually edited field values. If the AI is no longer confident, the document returns to the manual review queue and its extracted fields are cleared until it is reclassified. The original file is not re-scanned.
texts.Document:RerecognizeQueued: Re-classification started. Status will refresh shortly.
texts.Document:ReextractFields:Confirm: Re-extract the type-bound fields for this document on the existing classification? This re-runs only field extraction (no reclassification, no OCR) and overwrites the current field values, including any manual corrections. The document's type is unchanged.
texts.Document:ReextractFieldsQueued: Field re-extraction started. Status will refresh shortly.
texts.Document:Reprocess:FieldExtraction:Title: Batch Re-extract Fields
texts.Document:Reprocess:FieldExtraction:Subti: Re-extract type-bound fields for existing documents of type "{0}".
texts.Document:Reprocess:FieldExtraction:NoFie: This type has no fields defined yet.
texts.Document:Reprocess:FieldExtraction:Warni: This overwrites existing field values on these documents, including any manual corrections. Classification is unchanged.
texts.Document:Reprocess:FieldExtraction:Queue: Batch field re-extraction started. It will run in the background.
texts.Document:Reprocess:Reclassification:Scop: Local correction: evicts documents that no longer match. Does NOT pull in documents that should belong here but were classified elsewhere.
Evicts and pulls in. Required to make a new type take effect or to gather scattered same-kind documents; largest blast radius.
Re-judge only documents that previously failed to classify. Small scope, safe.
texts.Document:Reprocess:Reclassification:Incl: Also reclassify documents confirmed by an operator
By default, manually confirmed documents are skipped to protect operator work. Check this to overwrite them.
texts.Document:Reprocess:Reclassification:Warn: This overwrites automatic classification results. Documents with low confidence are sent back to the review queue and their extracted fields are cleared. Successful ones also have their fields re-extracted. Large blast radius and may incur LLM cost.
texts.Document:Reprocess:Reclassification:Queu: Batch reclassification started. It will run in the background.
texts.Document:Pipeline:RetryQueued: Retry queued. Status will refresh shortly.
texts.Document:Review:RejectReasonHint: Required. Recorded on the document for audit.
texts.Document:Review:Hint:UnresolvedClassific: Choose or create a document type, or upload a better source file.
texts.Document:Review:Hint:MissingRequiredFiel: Fill in the required fields below to clear this:
texts.Document:Review:Hint:SegmentationIncompl: Re-run classification, or reject this document.
texts.Document:Review:Hint:DuplicateSuspected: Compare with the candidate documents, then release it as not a duplicate or delete it.
texts.Document:Filter:AddFieldHint: Add a filter to narrow the list by extracted field values.
texts.Document:Filter:SelectTypeHint: Select a document type to filter by its fields.
texts.Document:Filter:NoFilterableFields: This document type has no filterable fields.
texts.Document:NoFieldValues: No field values yet. Click Edit to fill them in.
texts.DocumentType:Title: Document Types
texts.DocumentType:Empty: No document types yet. Create one to start classifying documents and extracting fields.
texts.DocumentType:TypeCodeHint: Identifier with segments separated by '.' (e.g. host.contract). Auto-suggested from the display name; you can edit it.
texts.DocumentType:TypeCodeInvalid: Only letters, digits, underscore and hyphen segments separated by '.' are allowed.
texts.DocumentType:DescriptionHint: Optional. Helps the AI recognize this type during classification (e.g. typical contents or distinguishing features). Not applied to document content.
texts.DocumentType:ConfidenceThresholdHint: 0–1. Classifications below this value go to manual review.
texts.DocumentType:AreYouSureToDelete: Delete this document type? Its field definitions are removed too. Documents using it must be reclassified first.
texts.DocumentType:DeleteFailed: Failed to delete the document type.
texts.Cabinet:Title: Cabinets
texts.Cabinet:Empty: No cabinets yet. Create one to organize documents by group or batch.
texts.Cabinet:Name: Name
texts.Cabinet:NameHint: A cabinet groups documents by manual organization (e.g. Legal Dept, 2024 Project) — orthogonal to the AI document type.
texts.Cabinet:DescriptionHint: Optional. Helps the AI pick this cabinet when an upload is left unfiled (e.g. what kinds of documents belong here). Not applied to document content.
texts.Cabinet:AreYouSureToDelete: Delete this cabinet? Documents in it become unfiled (they are not deleted).
texts.FieldDefinition:Title: Type-Bound Fields
texts.FieldDefinition:Empty: No fields defined for this type yet.
texts.FieldDefinition:Name: Name
texts.FieldDefinition:NameHint: Machine key used as the extraction JSON key. Auto-suggested from the display name; you can edit it.
texts.FieldDefinition:NameInvalid: Only letters, digits, underscore and hyphen are allowed (1–64 chars).
texts.FieldDefinition:PromptHint: Optional — tell the model what to extract. Leave blank to let it infer from the field name and type.
texts.FieldDefinition:PolishHint: Rewrite the instruction into clean, well-formed Markdown with AI. Review before saving.
texts.FieldDefinition:PolishDone: Prompt polished — review it before saving.
texts.FieldDefinition:PolishUnavailable: AI polish is unavailable right now.
texts.FieldDefinition:PromptMarkdownHint: Markdown is supported. Use AI polish to clean up the formatting, or draft from prompt to fill the field metadata.
texts.FieldDefinition:DraftHint: Write the extraction prompt first, then let AI draft the field name, type and options. You can edit everything before saving.
texts.FieldDefinition:DraftReviewNotice: AI drafted the fields below from your prompt — please review and adjust before saving.
texts.FieldDefinition:DraftUnavailable: Couldn't draft from the prompt. Please fill in the fields manually.
texts.FieldDefinition:AllowMultipleHint: Text fields only — stores a list of values (e.g. tags, parties).
texts.FieldDefinition:IsUniqueKeyHint: Values of all key fields together identify a document; a re-upload with the same key is flagged as a possible duplicate.
texts.Extract:InvalidDocumentTypeCodeFormat: Document type code '{typeCode}' is not allowed. Must match pattern '{pattern}' (letters, digits, underscore, hyphen segments, optionally separated by '.'; no leading/trailing/consecutive '.').
texts.Extract:DocumentTypeCodeAlreadyExists: Document type code '{TypeCode}' is already in use (including soft-deleted records). Use a different code, or restore the existing one.
texts.Extract:DocumentTypePackUnsupportedVersi: Configuration pack for '{TypeCode}' uses an unsupported version ({Version}). This deployment supports pack version {Supported}.
texts.Extract:DocumentTypeInUse: Document type '{TypeCode}' is still referenced by one or more documents. Reclassify those documents before deleting this type.
texts.Extract:DocumentTypeRestoreConflict: Cannot restore document type '{TypeCode}': another active document type with the same code already exists.
texts.Extract:FieldDefinitionAlreadyExists: Field '{Name}' is already defined on document type '{DocumentTypeCode}' (including soft-deleted records).
texts.Extract:FieldDefinitionRestoreConflict: Cannot restore field '{Name}' on document type '{DocumentTypeCode}': another active field with the same name already exists.
texts.Extract:FieldDefinitionParentTypeMissing: Cannot restore field '{Name}': the parent document type '{DocumentTypeCode}' is missing or still deleted. Restore the document type first.
texts.Extract:FieldDefinitionDataTypeChangeNot: Cannot change the data type of field '{Name}': it already has extracted values stored. Create a new field instead.
texts.Extract:FieldDefinitionMultiValueRequire: Multi-value is only supported for Text fields, but '{dataType}' was requested. Use a Text field to allow multiple values.
texts.Extract:FieldDefinitionMultiValueChangeN: Cannot turn off multi-value on field '{Name}': it already has extracted values stored, and narrowing to single-value would orphan the extra values. Create a new field instead.
texts.Extract:InvalidFieldDefinitionName: Field name '{name}' is invalid. Names must match pattern '{pattern}' (letters, digits, underscore, hyphen; 1-64 chars).
texts.Extract:InvalidFieldDefinitionDisplayNam: Field display name '{displayName}' contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Extract:InvalidDocumentTypeDisplayName: Document type display name '{displayName}' contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Extract:InvalidDocumentTypeDescription: Document type description contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Extract:NoDocumentTypesConfigured: No document types are configured for this scope. Create at least one document type before uploading documents (Host admin via 'host.*' types; tenant admin via tenant-scoped types).
texts.Extract:MarkdownIsImmutable: Extracted markdown has already been set and cannot be changed.
texts.Extract:DocumentDuplicate: This file has already been uploaded ({FileName}).
texts.Extract:DocumentInRecycleBin: This file already exists in the recycle bin ({FileName}).
texts.Extract:DocumentFileTooLarge: File '{FileName}' exceeds the maximum allowed size of {MaxBytes} bytes.
texts.Extract:DocumentUnsupportedFileType: File '{FileName}' has an unsupported type ('{ContentType}'). Please upload a supported image, PDF, CSV/TSV, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, or XLSX file.
texts.Extract:DocumentNoSourceBlob: This document has no source file available for download.
texts.Extract:DocumentRestoreConflict: Cannot restore document '{DocumentId}': a live sub-document with the same source constituent already exists. The restore is rejected to avoid a duplicate.
texts.Extract:PipelineRetryInProgress: Pipeline '{PipelineCode}' already has an attempt in progress.
texts.Extract:PipelineNotRetryable: Pipeline '{PipelineCode}' is in '{Status}' state and cannot be retried.
texts.Extract:DocumentNotClassified: This document has no document type yet. Classify it before editing extracted fields.
texts.Extract:DocumentNotTextExtracted: This document has no extracted text yet. Re-classification is available only after text extraction succeeds.
texts.Extract:UnknownExtractedField: Field '{FieldName}' is not defined on document type '{DocumentTypeCode}'.
texts.Extract:InvalidExtractedFieldValue: Field '{FieldName}' on document type '{DocumentTypeCode}' must be a valid {DataType} value.
texts.Extract:FieldTypeDoesNotSupportRange: Field '{FieldName}' is of type {DataType}, which supports only equality matching, not range (min/max) queries.
texts.Extract:FieldTypeNotQueryable: Field '{FieldName}' is of type {DataType} (long-form text), which cannot be used as a search filter.
texts.Extract:InvalidExportTemplateName: The data download configuration name contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Extract:ExportTemplateNameAlreadyExists: A data download configuration named '{Name}' already exists.
texts.Extract:ExportTemplateRequiresColumn: A data download configuration must define at least one column.
texts.Extract:ExportTemplateTooManyColumns: Too many columns ({count}); the maximum is {max}.
texts.Extract:ExportTemplateDuplicateField: Field '{fieldDefinitionId}' is already added to this configuration. Each field can only appear once.
texts.Extract:ExportDocumentLimitExceeded: The download matches {count} documents, exceeding the per-download limit of {max}. Narrow the filter or select fewer documents.
texts.ExportTemplate:Title: Data Download
texts.ExportTemplate:Empty: No download configurations yet. Create one to download document data as CSV / XLSX.
texts.ExportTemplate:Name: Name
texts.ExportTemplate:ColumnCapNotice: This type has more fields than the maximum; only the first columns were added. Remove any you don't need.
texts.ExportTemplate:DeleteFailed: Failed to delete the download configuration.
texts.Extract:InvalidCabinetName: Cabinet name '{name}' contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Extract:InvalidCabinetDescription: Cabinet description contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Extract:CabinetNameAlreadyExists: A cabinet named '{Name}' already exists in this scope.
texts.Extract:InvalidCabinetId: The selected cabinet does not exist in this scope.
